title: The Real Reason Homeowners Say "I Need to Talk to My Wife"
excerpt: Every contractor knows the feeling. The appointment went well. They liked you. Then comes the line. Here is why one-legged appointments kill deals and what to do about it.

title: Why Your Leads Go Cold After the Estimate (And How to Stop It)
excerpt: The window between delivering an estimate and hearing back is where most jobs are lost. Here is what happens during that silence and how to break it.

title: How to Follow Up With Roofing Leads Without Being Annoying
excerpt: Most roofing follow-up fails because it puts too much work on the homeowner. Here is a 3-message sequence that recovers 15-20% of estimates that go cold.
